overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along a sidewalk past construction barriers, crosses an intersection, and approaches a massive corporate skyscraper with distinctive red accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with construction barriers

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing crosses directly in front of camera, temporarily blocking view
approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to orange construction barriers, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: crossing the sidewalk from left to right in front of the camera
black car driving down the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers lining the sidewalk edge
massive dark skyscraper with vertical red accent lights dominating the skyline
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the foggy atmosphere
illuminated advertisement screen on building facade showing product ads

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy futuristic city sidewalk bordered by orange construction barriers. The massive Arasaka-style tower looms ahead with red lights, while street lamps cast bright glows through the haze. Pedestrians occasionally cross the path, and vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

events.description: leaving sidewalk and entering the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
person in light jacket walking across the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
raised roadway structure with concrete support columns

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the sidewalk into the wide urban intersection. The camera crosses the street between moving vehicles, with the mega-skyscraper growing larger in the center of the frame. Overhead traffic lights and elevated highway structures become visible as the construction barriers fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area at base of corporate mega-tower

events.description: entering the open plaza area in front of the skyscraper base
slowing pace and looking upward at the tower facade while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward the base of the massive skyscraper, occasionally looking up at the illuminated building facade and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: open paved plaza area with red curb markings leading to the tower base
tall palm tree silhouetted against the building lights
row of illuminated shop fronts and digital advertising screens at the tower base

segments.scene_description: Entering the expansive plaza at the base of the mega-skyscraper, which now fills the center of the view with its imposing height and red accent lighting. The area features palm trees, digital storefronts, and reflective wet pavement. The camera approaches the building entrance while surveying the futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, obstructed city sidewalk toward the imposing entrance of a massive corporate skyscraper. It begins by moving past orange construction barriers through a thick fog, where street lamps cast bright glows and the red lights of a distant tower loom ahead. As the camera leaves the sidewalk and crosses a wide urban intersection, the construction barriers fall away and the mega-skyscraper grows larger in the frame, flanked by overhead traffic lights and elevated highway structures. The scene then opens into an expansive plaza featuring palm trees and digital storefronts, where the red-accented architecture dominates the view. Finally, the camera glides across reflective wet pavement, approaching the building's entrance while surveying the towering futuristic facade.
